title_options: This Shrimp Punches So Hard The Water Hits Twice
The Mantis Shrimp Punch That Makes Water Flash
description_starter:
A mantis shrimp punch is so fast it creates cavitation: tiny vapor bubbles that flash, collapse, and add a second shock.

#shorts #science #animals #mantisshrimp #ocean
privacy_recommendation: private draft for Gate 5 review first; do not public publish without explicit Gate 6 authorization
known_caveat: Controlled/procedural mechanics fallback, not true licensed high-speed cavitation footage.
